content.en:
Seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two territories.

Death voids, a portal descends.

Wow!!

After the Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God descended, they immediately ~ went to the Eternal Realm.

They all restrained their breaths, and in this way, Ye Tian would definitely not be able to find them.

When they descend to the Eternal Realm and lock on Ye Tian's true god and all the clones as soon as possible, they can kill them one by one.

As long as the true God is in it, don't try to hide from it.

And.

In order to kill Ye Tian, they prepared many treasures, including a treasure that blocked an extradimensional realm.

If it was in an extradimensional realm with a superdimensional realm, they naturally didn't dare to block it, otherwise they would be looking for death, and no one would dare to do that.

But the Eternal Realm is very weak, there is no Transcendent Realm, the strongest one is Ye Tian, and in order to kill Ye Tian, they naturally dare to block the entire Eternal Realm.

Their speed was very fast, but in order to be secretive, they didn't use the treasure to shuttle directly over long distances, so the movement was too big.

So, they're moving forward in a normal way, which is more hidden.

It didn't take long for the Eternal Frontier to arrive.

......

"Do it!"

The Ice Bee Realm God directly sacrificed a super-dimensional secret treasure - Eternal Dark Night, the Eternal Dark Night is a shape similar to a bowl, and after the sacrifice came out, it instantly turned into a light curtain that enveloped the entire Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm, and the Transcendent Realm formed by the Demon Seed Abyss.

At the same time, Ye Tian's duplicate bodies sensed the situation in the outside world one by one.

"Two half-step extradimensional realms!"

In an instant, Ye Tian used the strange blood pupil to lock on to the Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God.

Ye Tian didn't know the Ice Bee Realm God, but he knew the Ziya Realm God.

At the beginning, a clone of the gods of the Ziya Realm and the God of the Split Realm came to besiege him, and he was killed with a wave of his hand.

"It's the Ice Ghost Organization, I didn't expect the Ice Ghost Organization to give birth to two half-step extradimensional realms. "

Ye Tian smiled slightly, not panicked at all.

If it was a top-notch half-step transcendent realm, he might still be afraid of one or two.

But these two half-step extra-dimensional realms have just broken through, and they haven't even opened up the extra-dimensional heart domain, and the super-dimensional power is still the initial extra-dimensional power.

Their only advantage is that they have transformed their physical bodies when they are at the peak of the realm gods, and they have a powerful extra-dimensional bloodline, so after breaking through to the half-step super-dimensional realm, the strength of their physical bodies far exceeds the ordinary half-step super-dimensional realm.

However, Ye Tian's foundation was too strong, and when he was at the peak of the realm gods, he condensed fifteen eternal realm spirits and broke through in the most perfect way, and now he has also improved the progress of the transcendent body, and the strength of the physical body is also beyond the ice bee realm gods.

Whether it is the strength of the physical body, the super-dimensional Dao species, the super-dimensional power, the Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God, they are completely incomparable, what do they use to fight Ye Tian?

Rumble!!!!

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian directly shattered the Eternal Night with the extradimensional power of the Consummation Realm, and immediately descended in front of the Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God.

At this moment, the Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God were extremely confused.

Ye Tian broke through to the half-step transcendent realm, they were not surprised, they had expected it a long time ago.

But he didn't expect that Ye Tian's strength was so strong that it shattered the Eternal Dark Night in an instant, and an ordinary half-step transcendent realm couldn't do it at all.

However, they still did not give up.

"Ziya, do it!"

Ice Bee Realm Shinto.

The God of the Ziya Realm immediately urged the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon and broke out in the Black Scale Domain Realm.

In an instant, the black Black Scale Domain Realm enveloped this area, enveloping Ye Tian as well.

A terrifying force suppressed Ye Tian, suppressing his cultivation and physical body.

Ye Tian showed a look of surprise, the God of the Ziya Realm was able to suppress his strength, this ability was really a bit against the sky.

If the God of the Ziya Realm is equal to his strength, it is reasonable to suppress his strength, but the God of the Ziya Realm is obviously much weaker than him, and he can still suppress his strength, which is not normal.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't think that it was a superdimensional technique created by the gods of the Ziya Realm itself, it must have been a superdimensional bloodline from the other party's fusion.

"Kill!"

The Ice Bee Realm God immediately made a move, holding a knife of a super-dimensional secret treasure, this knife was much more powerful than ordinary super-dimensional secret treasures, and even smelted a lot of special super-dimensional materials, containing a trace of the power of a super-dimensional Dao soldier. []

Past.

The Ice Bee Realm Gods couldn't exert the power of this super dimensional secret treasure, but now they can.

"Ye Tian Realm God, no matter how strong you are, under the suppression of the Black Scale Domain Realm, you can't exert thirty percent of your strength, even if this blow can't kill you, there is hope to hit you hard!" thought the Ice Bee Realm God.

But the next moment, he was dumbfounded.

I saw that Ye Tian condensed the superdimensional power of the Consummation Realm on his right hand, urged his superdimensional body, and instantly crossed the superdimensional void, grabbing his superdimensional secret treasure knife with one hand, so that his attack could no longer advance an inch.

0 begging for flowers

Followed by.

Ye Tian's other hand pressed on his body, directly shattering his body, and the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure Knife was directly taken away by Ye Tian.

The shattered body of the Ice Bee Realm God healed quickly, but he had already been severely injured.

Now.

The gods of the Ziya Realm were all stunned, under the suppression of his Black Scale Domain Realm, Ye Tian was still able to severely damage the Ice Bee Realm Gods with one move, what kind of strength is this?

"You dare to attack and kill me with this little strength?"

Ye Tian sneered.

In an instant, he stepped forward and struck the Ice Bee Realm God again.

"Ziya, save me!"

The Ice Bee Realm God was terrified.

The Ziya Realm God gritted his teeth, manipulated the Black Scale Domain Realm, and began to shrink, shrinking the Black Scale Domain Realm infinitely, turning into a black barrier covering the Ice Bee Realm God, in order to protect the Ice Bee Realm God.

It's not that he hit the big leader so hard, the main thing is that the Ice Bee Realm God can't die at the moment, once the Ice Bee Realm God dies, he may not be able to survive when he faces a terrifying powerhouse like Ye Tian alone.

Rumble!

Ye Tian used the extra-dimensional technique of True Ming Aurora to hit the Ice Bee Realm God with one blow, no matter how magical the Black Scale Domain Realm was, it was pierced by a single blow, and at the same time, it also penetrated the body of the Ice Bee Realm God, hitting it hard again.

At this time, the Ice Bee Realm God was already dying, and even his consciousness began to sink.

"Run!"

The Ziya Realm God knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent anyway, and he couldn't save the Ice Bee Realm God at all, so he had to distance himself and use the ability of the Black Scale Domain Dragon's superdimensional bloodline to escape from this territory.

As long as he left the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two, Ye Tian would not be able to chase and kill him at all.

What he thought was very beautiful, but Ye Tian wouldn't give him time to leave.

Just when the Ziya Realm God opened a little distance, urging the Black Scale Domain Dragon bloodline to form a portal to leave, Ye Tian's other copy body took the opportunity to kill it, pierced the body of the Ziya Realm God with one blow, and crossed the portal with the Ziya Realm God.

In an instant, they left the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory and descended on the Ice Ghost Order's headquarters.

Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters.

A group of peak realm gods looked at Ye Tian, who came back with the Ziya realm gods, and they were stunned one by one, not knowing what had happened.
